description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted radiator with a rectangular form and a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars, finished in a dark green color. The radiator is mounted on a flat, light-colored panel, and features two visible pipe connections at the bottom, one on the left and one on the right, likely for water inlet and outlet. The horizontal bars are flat and wide, providing ample surface area for heat dissipation, and are arranged in a ladder-like pattern with a small gap between each bar. The lower section of the radiator has more closely spaced bars, while the upper section has wider gaps, possibly for towel hanging. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a semi-glossy finish that reflects some light. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or utility spaces.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted green radiator with horizontal bars and dual bottom pipe connections, featuring a smooth, semi-glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the radiator with horizontal bars and visible pipe connections at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and its mounting on a flat panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the flat mounting panel, with the radiator itself not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and mounting arrangement.
attribute_pipe_connections: two, bottom left and bottom right, horizontal orientation
